gate.definition: 7-condition live billion proof: default /demo-up N (no flags), reproducibly on a cold reset-to-seed on billion.taildc510.ts.net
gate.reproducibility: 2 clean default cold reset-to-seed cycles (iter-04b + iter-05), both 7/7, measured from this Mac (the tailnet peer) + independently orchestrator-re-verified from this Mac

conditions.C1: hiring org present, is_hiring=true, EXACTLY 5 admin + 45 candidate
conditions.C2: recruiter comparison 42 comparable candidates x each of the 5 positions (>=40), junk=0, prod-ejects=0 (orchestrator re-verify: 5/5 sims x 42, junk=0)
conditions.C3: both candidate heroes (Cara Completed / Cody Assigned) render usable assessed profiles
conditions.C4: org reads as hiring (nav 'Results', cockpit 'Hiring' label, roster org_is_hiring)
conditions.C5: recruiter p95 click->ACCESS 1.09 s (cycle1) / 2.36 s (cycle2) < 5 s; orchestrator re-verify p95 1.74 s < 5 s (the 3rd measured vantage)
conditions.C6: coexists with the 3 workforce orgs (12 heroes / 4 orgs on the cockpit)
conditions.C7: 0 platform-repo edits (demo clone left git-clean; cms '?? studio/' = disclosed M221 D-05h)

ledger.iter-01: tok (bootstrap) — Phase 0b KB-fidelity GREEN; billion recon; authored TOK-01 reprove-hiring-on-billion
ledger.iter-02: tik — teardown stale v2.3 + substrate cutover + first default cold bring-up GREEN + FIRST 7-condition measurement (3/7; C1 3+47, C2/3/5 blocked by :13001 serve gap)
ledger.iter-03: tik — Finding-1 serve fix applied (:13001 peer-reachable) + measured recruiter vantage (6/7; C2 44x5 junk=0, C3 usable, C5 p95 1.50 s)
ledger.iter-04: tik — Finding-2 fix (role_mix.admin 0.1->0.14 -> exactly 5+45) + full DEFAULT cold re-bring-up -> 7/7 GREEN (provisional); Findings 3+4 surfaced
ledger.iter-05: tik — Finding-4 fix (C2 harness insights-capture race) + 2nd clean DEFAULT cold cycle -> GATE MET (7/7 reproducible)

findings_surfaced_and_fixed_live.F1: serve-hiring — apps/hiring :3001+off not tailscale-fronted -> recruiter/candidate conditions dead cross-machine; fix add ('hiring',3001) to gen_tailscale_serve.py UI_BROWSER_FACING
findings_surfaced_and_fixed_live.F2: count 3+47 vs 5+45 (hero-slot displacement) -> one-line preset bump role_mix.admin 0.1->0.14 (band=7 -> 5 net admins survive the 2 candidate-hero overrides)
findings_surfaced_and_fixed_live.F3: surgical-orphan :13001 bind-conflict — artifact of iter-03's surgical serve re-apply, NOT the default flow; self-resolves (default flow writes a reset plan incl :13001)
findings_surfaced_and_fixed_live.F4: C2 harness insights-capture race on a cold stack -> poll for insightsByJobSimulations LIST capture (bounded 30 s, non-fatal); harness robustness, not a product change
findings_surfaced_and_fixed_live.F5: C2 cold/tailnet probe-budget — a cold compare-drawer first render (~2.5 min/sim, the R4 hydration) blew the hardcoded 300 s per-test budget -> RENDER_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS env-tunable (default 300000) so a cold measurement can't false-fail

notes: The acceptance-closer / prove-on-billion milestone (the M215/M221 lineage applied to the hiring release) and the FINAL v2.4 milestone. All 7 gate conditions were built + local-proven at M222-M225; M226's only new information was what breaks on a live cross-machine cold run — 5 findings surfaced + fixed live, all tooling/harness/seed, 0 platform edits. Gate MET reproducibly (2 cold cycles + orchestrator independent re-verify from this Mac). R4 (compare-drawer cold render) documented in latency-budget.md as a warm-up transient, not a gate violation. Close operated LOCAL/peer only: deterministic suites (go/python/tsc) re-run GREEN + 5/5 flake gate = the close-time signal; billion was NOT re-brought-up and is LEFT UP as the live-proof artifact. Zero platform-repo edits throughout. Since M226 is the final v2.4 milestone, the release-branch merge is the only merge here (no main-merge, no v2.4 tag) -> suggest /developer-kit:close-release.
